name: ntucool
description: NTU COOL (cool.ntu.edu.tw) — CLI + MCP server bundle with usage guidance for AI agents. NTU-only (ADFS SAML auth).

plugins.name: ntucool
plugins.description: NTU COOL CLI + MCP server. After installing this plugin, run /ntucool:setup — it installs the `cool` and `ntucool-mcp` binaries (prebuilt for linux/windows, cargo install for macOS) and walks you through `cool login`.
